reports.title: Market Pulse Daily
reports.subtitle: Weekend Edition (data as of 2026-03-13)
reports.stance: Defensive bias; reduce risk, keep dry powder, deploy only in small tranches into relative strength
reports.mainDriver: Middle East war + crude above $100 -> rupee at record low + persistent FII de-risking -> broad Indian risk-off sell-off.
reports.summary: Risk-off correction strengthened: Nifty -2.06%, VIX ~22.75, rupee at record low close 92.46/$; sector rotation favors defensives while metals/auto/PSU banks lead the fall.

reports.title: Market Pulse Daily
reports.subtitle: Risk-off correction
reports.stance: Defensive and patient: protect capital first, add only on strength or after stabilization.
reports.mainDriver: Iran-war driven crude spike + heavy FII selling + rupee making new lows => repricing of risk.
reports.summary: Risk-off correction day: Nifty -2.06% to 23,151; VIX >22; crude >$100; rupee at record low ~92.46; FIIs sold ~₹10.7k Cr while DIIs bought ~₹10.0k Cr; cyclicals (metals/auto/PSU banks) hit hardest; FMCG was lone shelter.

reports.title: Market Pulse Daily
reports.subtitle: Risk-off correction
reports.stance: Defensive first, selective offense only in relative-strength pockets.
reports.mainDriver: Oil up sharply + INR weakness + persistent FII selling = macro-driven risk-off day.
reports.summary: Risk-off day driven by oil shock and INR weakness. Autos and banks sold off hard; energy/power held up. FIIs sold heavily; DIIs absorbed. VIX stayed above 20.
